technical_scope.project_name: Shalom Prayer Center — Complete HVAC System
execution_scope: Supply & Installation of Equipment: Furnish and install 5 indoor Air Handling Units (AHUs) and 5 outdoor condensing units per mechanical schedule.
Fabricated Ductwork: Execution of approximately 7,500 lbs of galvanized ductwork, utilizing 24ga (6,000 lbs) and 22ga (1,500 lbs) materials to SMACNA Class A standards.
Air Distribution: Installation of 40 flexible duct drops (R-8 insulated) and associated registers, diffusers, and louvers.
Equipment Setting: Precise placement of 5 indoor AHUs within the mechanical mezzanine and 5 outdoor condensing units on the exterior concrete pad.
Ventilation: Installation of 4 exhaust fans to support high-density assembly spaces.
Support Systems: Suspension of ductwork via 1" x 26ga galvanized strap hangers, including seismic bracing, turnbuckles, and safety brackets per IMC Chapter 3.
regulatory_standards: Energy: 2018 International Energy Conservation Code (IECC), specifically R-8 minimum duct insulation to prevent condensation in the South Texas climate
Electrical: 2017 National Electrical Code (NEC) for all low-voltage control and sensor wiring
special_conditions: Mezzanine Access: Contractor acknowledges tight-clearance rigging requirements for the mechanical mezzanine and will utilize specialized labor and hoisting.
Clash Detection: Routing must account for structural steel trusses in the Nave as detailed in sheets M-101 and relevant building sections.
Quality Control: All sheet metal seams shall be sealed with premium mastic/sealant to ensure system integrity in high-humidity environments.
Equipment Quality: All AHU and condenser units shall meet or exceed manufacturer specifications for the South Texas climate.
exclusions: City of Edinburg mechanical permit application fees (Owner/GC responsibility).
Structural modifications to the roof decking or mechanical mezzanine.
Provision of temporary power or water during construction.
Primary low-voltage control wiring and final Test & Balance (TAB) report.
